intent: The living history of the village — legends, expeditions, and everyday life.

interpretation.this_is: The chronicle is not a log. It is a story. It is how the village understands itself.

legend.description: A story that defines the village. Something the village will tell for generations.
legend.example: The Legend of the First Diamond — Forge found a diamond on the third expedition, and the village celebrated with bread and song.

expedition.description: A journey outside the village. The village's way of reaching beyond itself.
expedition.example: The expedition to the eastern hills returned with gold, but one of the party said they saw a light on the mountain.

everyday.description: The small moments that make up life in the village. The things that are remembered only because they matter.
everyday.example: Today, Terra planted a flower. The village did not notice, but the flower did.

decision.description: A moment when the village chose something.
decision.example: The village decided to build a wall. It was the first time they all agreed.

format.timestamp: The time the entry was made.
format.title: A short name for the entry.
format.outcome: What changed because of this entry.

interpretation.notes: Every entry is written by Chronos, but the story belongs to the whole village.
